race.comment: OFF THEIR PERCH (11) opened this prep last start with a third, beaten 3.5 lengths, over 1100m at Pakenham. Should improve off that and will be very hard to hold out in the wider lanes. WONBOYN (2) is a talented gelding who has been in the money at both appearances. Resumes here with the profile to go on with it this time around. ON THE LOOSE (6) was too good for a maiden field last start over 1300m at Geelong, scoring by half a length. Well placed to go on with the job. HOOK 'N' SPUR (3) could only manage seventh two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1400m at Geelong, beaten just 1.5 lengths. No surprise to see him in the mix.
